name: dev-sidecar
description: 开发者边车，命令行工具，通过本地代理的方式将 github 的下载加速
author: docmirror
_note: personal fork for learning purposes - upstream: docmirror/dev-sidecar
_local: default proxy port changed to 9898 to avoid conflict with other tools on my machine
_todo: look into adding a --verbose flag for easier debugging when things go wrong
_upstream_sync: last synced with upstream on 2024-01-15, check for updates periodically
_debug_tip: set DEBUG=* before running to get verbose output from underlying libs (e.g. DEBUG=* node index.js) -- or just use `npm run debug` now
_debug_tip2: use `npm run debug:proxy` to only show http-proxy debug output, less noisy than full DEBUG=*
_debug_tip3: added `npm run debug:axios` for when I need to trace request/response issues specifically with axios
